title: Define candidate assessment bundle for score-version comparison
description:
## Summary
Define one canonical candidate assessment bundle contract for score-version comparison.

## Canonical bundle contents
- identity: scorecard, score, baseline_version, candidate_version.
- stage_runs: evaluation IDs, dataset IDs when used, sample protocol, status, timestamps.
- metrics: AC1/accuracy/precision/recall and deltas.
- malfunction context: category shares, red flags, primary_next_action.
- decision: accept/reject/inconclusive with machine-readable reason.

## Storage contract
- Full bundle JSON persisted as attachment.
- Compact summary fields persisted on task/evaluation-facing records for fast UI queries.
- One-path persistence contract: no duplicate/fallback persistence paths.

## Acceptance criteria
- Bundle schema is deterministic and test-validated.
- Decision output is reproducible from persisted bundle + referenced evaluations.
